prompt: Turn issue #142 in acme/platform into independently-grabbable GitHub issues. The parent issue is a PRD for saved searches with email alerts; fetch the comments, propose vertical slices first, then create child issues after approval. Make sure a future implementation agent can determine from GitHub alone that the executable work lives in the PRD issue's sub-issues and which AFK task is next.
assertions: Fetches the GitHub issue with comments before slicing.
Presents a numbered proposed breakdown before creating child issues because the source is an existing GitHub issue.
Includes execution-wave or equivalent ready-order guidance so future agents can tell what comes next.
Creates a queue-guide/task-graph child issue because the parent GitHub issue cannot be edited, and makes clear that the executable tasks remain sibling direct sub-issues of the PRD issue.
Queue guidance tells future agents to pick the lowest ready AFK wave/task whose blockers are closed, and to hold HITL work until the named decision or review is complete.
Attaches child issues to the parent using addSubIssue without GraphQL variables in the mutation signature.
